description: Analyze any website for AI visibility (AEO/GEO). Returns score 0-100 with breakdown, issues, and prioritized recommendations for appearing in ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity answers.

tools.name: analyze_aeo
tools.description: Full AEO audit — score 0-100, grade A-F, breakdown by category, issues, and recommendations

tools.name: get_aeo_score
tools.description: Quick AEO score check — returns score and grade only

tools.name: check_ai_readiness
tools.description: Check if AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot) can access the site, and if llms.txt is present
